title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, UI
scenario: Notification master toggle shows OFF and individual toggles are greyed out in App Settings > General when notification permission is denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. When prompted for notification permission, tap "Deny" or "Don't Allow".
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications.
5. Observe the master toggle for Notifications.
6. Observe the individual notification toggles (e.g., Call alerts, Message alerts, etc.).
expected: The master toggle for Notifications is set to OFF. All individual notification toggles are greyed out and cannot be interacted with.
